facts.statement: Japan has won 2 World Baseball Classic titles
facts.actual: Japan has won 3 World Baseball Classic titles (2006, 2009, 2023)

facts.statement: The 2023 WBC game between Puerto Rico and the Dominican Republic was watched by 50% of households in Puerto Rico
facts.actual: 62% of households in Puerto Rico watched the 2023 Pool D game

facts.statement: The World Baseball Classic was first held in 2000
facts.actual: The World Baseball Classic was first held in 2006

facts.statement: The USA has won 2 World Baseball Classic titles
facts.actual: The USA has won 1 World Baseball Classic title

facts.statement: The World Baseball Classic occurs every 4 years
facts.actual: The World Baseball Classic is triennial, occurring every 3 years
